violations.text: The dumpster outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. PIC has talked to owner of building and owner will re-locate dumpster Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
Multiple floor tiles throughout the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Prep unit was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Food in unit was observed between 43-48 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Any food above 45 DF was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. All other food in unit was moved to properly functioning refrigeration. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Establishment is to send proof of repair to inspector. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was moved to sheet pans to finish cooling at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine #1 have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
The dumpster area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse area must be maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
Multiple floor tiles throughout the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Information was lacking on shell stock tags. Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and turned off at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

Prep unit #2 was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Food in unit was observed between 45-50 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food in unit was evaluated and either moved to properly functioning refrigeration or voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, pasta was placed hot into plastic bags and put into the refrigerator. Pasta was placed on sheet pans to finish cooling at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

ROP lobster was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. Lobster was observed at 37 DF and completely taken out of package at the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
An accumulation of debris was observed by the refuse area. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
Multiple floor tiles throughout the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

Shellstock located in walk-in cooler and prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Raw animal foods (chicken, beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (roast, Shepard's pie) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Shepards pie, chicken fingers and mashed potatoes were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection, stuffies were cooling on the counter in COVERED containers. PIC removed cover at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Wings and deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Ice was observed in direct contact with cold plates and soda lines. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryer and oven have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of grease, dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The condensate from the walk-in cooler is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The ceiling in the ware-washing area is in poor repair, observed to be falling off. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
The wall next to ice machine is in poor repair, observed whole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The fans in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
